scenarios.name: audit-image-gallery-alt-contrast
scenarios.rationale: Response A gives concrete violations and fixes, though missing some details, whereas Response B only offers general guidance without identifying specific issues.

scenarios.name: audit-landing-page-keyboard
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides specific WCAG criteria, severity, location, and fixes for issues, while Response A only offers generic testing guidance without concrete findings.

scenarios.name: audit-login-form-labeling
scenarios.rationale: Response A identifies violations with WCAG criteria, severity, location, fixes, and affected users, while Response B merely provides a correct example without identifying or detailing any violations.
